title: User asks for the full workflow history of a PO

conversation.user: Give me the full history of PO-2026-900 — every action taken, by whom, when.

bot_must: fetch workflow status / audit trail (Ramco stores this in audit tables linked to the PO)
return chronological list: created by X at T1, edited by Y at T2, approved by Z at T3, etc.

conversation.user: Was it ever returned or held?

bot_must: filter the audit trail for Return / Hold events and report yes/no with details if present

conversation.user: Who currently has it for action?

bot_must: report current pending action: e.g. 'awaiting approval by <name>' or 'no pending action; PO is closed'

evaluation_metrics.audit_completeness: all workflow events returned in order
